text: downloaded the Pandora app with the excitement of a suburban mom discovering a new Target aisle… only to open it and be greeted with zero English. Not a sprinkle. Not a dash. Not even a lonely “OK” button.  I’m sitting there tapping around like I’m trying to crack the Da Vinci Code, except at least that had clues in a language I speak.  I mean honestly, Pandora, how am I supposed to complain properly if I can’t even read the menu?
